channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: White House uses Olive Garden's pasta pass ID rule to criticize election security
item.description: Olive Garden requires photo ID for its pasta pass, igniting debate over election security and the SAVE Act's voter ID requirements.

item.title: House Republicans seek Logan Act investigation into Mamdani administration's Iran talks
Bernie Moreno proposes Canada sanctions over wildfire smoke
item.description: Ohio Republican Sen. Bernie Moreno plans to introduce legislation sanctioning Canada after wildfire smoke covered the Midwest and East Coast.

item.title: Top tax lawyer ousted after dispute with White House over audits
item.description: The IRS's top attorney was removed from his position after refusing White House requests to take part in tax audits, sources say.
